Supplements

Best Probiotics for Dogs 2026

Published on March 3, 2026

⚠️ Affiliate Disclosure: This post may contain affiliate links. We earn a commission if you make a purchase, at no extra cost to you.

Quick Summary

After testing 20+ dog probiotic supplements, here are our top picks:

🏆 Top Pick: Purina Pro Plan FortiFlora

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.8/5

Best for: Digestive health, sensitive stomachs

Price: $25 for 30 packets

Top 5 Dog Probiotics

1. Purina Pro Plan FortiFlora - Best Overall

Pros: Veterinarian recommended, palatable, easy to use

Cons: Single-strain formula

Check Price on Amazon →

2. Nutramax Proviable - Best Multi-Strain

Pros: 7 probiotic strains, includes prebiotics

Cons: Higher price point

Check Price on Amazon →

3. Zesty Paws Probiotic Bites - Best Tasty

Pros: Chewable form, dogs love the taste

Cons: Lower CFU count

Check Price on Amazon →

What to Look for

  • CFU Count: Look for at least 1-5 billion CFU
  • Multiple Strains: More strains = better coverage
  • Prebiotics: Food for the probiotics
  • Form: Powder, chew, or capsule
